---------------------
- unified_fragmergent_memory/                    full integrated package
- tests/                                         268-test suite (140 legacy + 20 FCE-Omega unit + 108 FCE-M functional)
- experiments/                                   experiments/r10b_integrated_phoenix.py + __init__
- tools/                                         fce_functional_report.py, stage_finalize.py

- results/pytest_full_transcript.txt
- results/pytest_functional_only.txt
- vendor/fce_omega_source/                       vendored FCE-Omega source (NO nested .git)
- docs/EVOLUTION_PROTOCOL.md                     staging discipline reference
- misiunea.txt                                   mission specification
- pyproject.toml                                 rewritten: name + version + URLs + keywords
- reproduce.sh                                   header updated to FCE-M

Files NOT migrated (excluded by design)

----------------
- Copied: assets/logo_fragmergent_causal_exponentiation_memory.png (relative path)
- Used in: README.md (top), PAPER.md (top), docs/ARCHITECTURE.md (top)
- No absolute Windows path in any document referencing the logo

Tests run
---------
Full suite:
    python -m pytest -q
    Result: 268 passed in 16.28s

FCE-M validation subset (no external Desktop folders needed):
    python -m pytest tests/fce_omega/ tests/fce_omega_functional/ -q
    Result: 128 passed in 2.38s

Final repository structure
--------------------------
fragmergent-causal-exponentiation-memory/
|-- assets/
|   `-- logo_fragmergent_causal_exponentiation_memory.png
|-- unified_fragmergent_memory/
|   |-- facade/             (config, memory_store, encoder, propagation, scoring, cross_substrate)
|   |-- runtime/            (orchestrator, async_orchestrator, organism_driven,
|   |                       fce_omega_observer, omega_registry, reference_field)
|   |-- sources/            (d_cortex, tf_engine, memory_engine_runtime, fce_omega)
|   `-- bridges/            (shape_translators, convention_translators,
|                           cross_substrate_pressure, fce_translator)
|-- vendor/
|   `-- fce_omega_source/   (frozen FCE-Omega source, NO nested .git)
|-- experiments/
|   `-- r10b_integrated_phoenix.py
|-- tests/
|   |-- fce_omega/              20 unit tests (v0.4.0)
|   |-- fce_omega_functional/   108 functional tests (v0.4.0 - v0.6.0)
|   |-- async_coupling/, auto_registration/, bridges/, cross_substrate/,
|   |-- facade/, natural_branch_flip/, natural_coupling/,
|   |-- organism_driven/, passthrough/    140 legacy UFME tests
|-- tools/
|   |-- fce_functional_report.py
|   `-- stage_finalize.py
|-- results/
|   |-- etapa_00_v0_4_0_baseline/
|   |-- etapa_01_v0_4_1_center_isolated_anchor/
|   |-- etapa_02_v0_4_2_r10b_integrated/  (+ r10b_trajectory.{json,txt})
|   |-- etapa_03_v0_5_0_multiperspectival_observer/
|   |-- etapa_04_v0_5_1_semi_active_priority_feedback/
|   |-- etapa_05_v0_6_0_native_memory_reference_field/
|   |-- fce_functional_report.{txt,json}
|   |-- pytest_full_transcript.txt
|   |-- pytest_functional_only.txt
|   `-- repository_academic_format_report.{txt,json}
|-- docs/
|   |-- ARCHITECTURE.md
|   |-- METHODOLOGY.md
|   |-- RESULTS.md
|   |-- FUNCTIONAL_VALIDATION.md
|   |-- NATIVE_MEMORY_MODEL.md
|   |-- LIMITATIONS.md
|   |-- REPRODUCIBILITY.md
|   `-- EVOLUTION_PROTOCOL.md
|-- README.md
|-- PAPER.md
|-- CHANGELOG.md
|-- CITATION.cff
|-- LICENSE
|-- misiunea.txt
|-- pyproject.toml
|-- requirements.txt
`-- reproduce.sh

Limitations remaining
---------------------
1. Legacy UFME source wrappers (unified_fragmergent_memory/sources/d_cortex,
   tf_engine, memory_engine_runtime) still reference three external Desktop
   paths. The full 268-test suite requires those external folders. The
   128-test FCE-M validation subset reproduces on any clean checkout.
   Documented in docs/REPRODUCIBILITY.md.
2. No self-application loop. Advisory feedback is inspectable metadata;
   consumers must act on it manually.
3. No first-class RelationRegistry.
4. ReferenceField.field_vector is a heuristic Phi_s + delta_X blend, not
   a learned semantic embedding.
5. Omega-field interactions only fire for co-active pairs in the same
   consolidate pass; no temporal cross-episode aggregation.
6. In-episode aggregation collapses multiple within-episode observations
   into one delta_X.
7. Z_norm alone is not a reliable single-axis discriminator; use AR / kappa.

Recommendations for release
---------------------------
1. Resolve the external-source dependency before public release. Two
   options:
     a) Add env-variable based fallbacks (UFME_DCORTEX_PATH, etc.) plus
        clear instructions in REPRODUCIBILITY.md.
     b) Vendor the three external source projects into vendor/ (mass
        copy with their __pycache__ + .git removed).
2. Add a CI workflow that runs the 128-test FCE-M validation subset on
   each push. The legacy 140 UFME tests can be marked as integration
   tests requiring the external projects.
3. Add a release tag v0.6.0-native-memory-prototype once the user is
   ready to push.
4. The CHANGELOG.md sections from v0.4.0 through v0.6.0 are already
   structured per the academic-style "Added / Changed / Validated /
   Limitations" convention.

Git status
----------
- No commits have been made yet to this destination repository.
- A `git init` has NOT been executed; the destination is a plain
  folder so far.
- When the user authorizes git init + commit, the recommended message is:
    v0.6.0 academic research repository format for FCE-M

Provenance
----------
- Original development workspace: ~/Desktop/fragmergent-causal-exponentiation memory/
  (with space; preserved as-is, not modified during migration)
- This destination: ~/Desktop/fragmergent-causal-exponentiation-memory/
  (no space; clean academic layout)

End of report.
